Possessing a strong background in operating an online fashion business, with practical experience in market research, trend analysis, and customer engagement. journey.title: My Journey
journey.content:
Third-year student majoring in Trade Business at Van Hien University with hands-on experience in online business, e-commerce, and social media sales.

I possess a strong background in operating an online fashion business, with practical experience in market research, trend analysis, and customer engagement. Skilled in content creation, livestream selling, and managing e-commerce platforms, I have built and sustained customer relationships through direct communication, contributing to repeat purchases and stable sales performance.

My experience spans end-to-end sales processes—from product sourcing and customer consultation to sales closing and order fulfillment. I conduct market research and trend analysis to select products aligned with customer demand, execute promotional campaigns, and leverage livestream selling to increase engagement and drive sales.

workHistory.description: Operated an online fashion business across social media and Shopee, achieving an average monthly revenue of ~15 million VND and generating over 150 million VND in annual profit.
achievements: Managed end-to-end sales process, including product sourcing, customer consultation, sales closing, and order fulfillment
Built strong customer relationships through direct communication, contributing to repeat purchases and stable sales performance
Conducted market research and trend analysis to select products aligned with customer demand
Executed promotional campaigns and livestream selling (4+ years of experience) to increase engagement and drive sales
Created social media content and product videos using CapCut to enhance product visibility and attract customers

workHistory.description: Provided in-store customer consultation and supported product selection.
achievements: Handled billing, order processing, and VAT invoice preparation
Assisted in product photography, video creation, and daily store operations

education.description: Third-year student majoring in Trade Business with hands-on experience in online business, e-commerce, and social media sales.
